emails.subject: Merrick
emails.body: In order to document the Merrick contract, I need some information. I need the legal name of Merrick, the state of incorporation, a physical address, telephone and fax numbers, scope of work, date work began and a contact name at Merrick. If you have any questions, please give me a call. Thanks, Bob.

emails.subject: Merrick
emails.body: In order to document the Merrick contract, I need some information. emails.subject: Re: Merrick
emails.body: Robert, A contact at Merrick is Ralph Townsend. He's the manager of engineering over their oil and gas group. He's at (303) 751 0741. As far as the scope of work is concerned, we could use the exact same wording used in the Forerunner agreement with the only exception being their scope was limited to just the House Creek project. Please let me know if you need anything else. Thanks Ken Robert Walker@ECT 07/20/2000 04:23 PM
